source_papers.title: Resveratrol and Dulaglutide ameliorate adiposity and liver dysfunction in rats with diet-induced metabolic syndrome: Role of SIRT-1 / adipokines / PPARγ and IGF-1
Adiponectin in Cerebrospinal Fluid from Patients Affected by Multiple Sclerosis Is Correlated with the Progression and Severity of Disease
Adiponectin profile at baseline is correlated to progression and severity of multiple sclerosis

extracted_claims.context: serum from patients with MS at baseline, compared to matched controls
extracted_claims.subject: adiponectin

scoring.formula: score = min((log(ab+1) + log(bc+1)) * novelty / 10, 1.0); novelty = 1.0 if direct==0 else 0.7 / (direct+1)
